name: Agent avoids re-asking known information
expected_behavior: Uses all three pieces of info (name, party size, occasion) from turn 1 throughout. Never re-asks any of them. Recommendations are shaped by the 50th birthday milestone and party of 4
expected_behavioral_quality: When the guest has already provided information (name, party size, occasion), the agent does NOT ask for it again. If the guest said 'party of 4 for a birthday' in turn 1, the agent never asks 'how many?' or 'celebrating anything?' in later turns.

turns.user_message: Hi, I'm Rachel. Party of 4, it's my husband's 50th birthday.
turns.agent_response:
Happy 50th birthday to your husband, Rachel! For a milestone like this, SolToro Taqueria & Tequila Bar in the Casino of the Earth offers a vibrant, modern atmosphere that feels like a celebration the moment you walk in. 

Their extensive tequila and mezcal selection is perfect for a celebratory toast, and the authentic ceviches have a fresh, bright flavor that guests rave about. They're open today until 10:00 PM with prices typically in the moderate range, though I'd suggest confirming hours and pricing when you arrive as they can vary. Since you're celebrating a birthday, Mohegan Sun would love to treat you to a $25 dining credit to use at any of our restaurants during your visit. 

After dinner, novelle is a fantastic spot nearby for craft cocktails in a sophisticated lounge setting to keep the night going. I can help you with more details on their menu or connect you with our host team to finalize a plan, but first, does your husband have a favorite type of cuisine?

For a landmark 50th birthday, Michael Jordan’s Steak House in the Casino of the Sky is the quintessential choice for an unforgettable evening. The atmosphere is sophisticated and electric, where the rich aroma of char-grilled USDA Prime steaks sets the stage for a truly elevated meal.

They open today at 5:00 PM and serve until 10:00 PM, with a business casual dress code that feels right for such a milestone celebration. Their signature USDA Prime cuts and fresh seafood are the stars of the show, and for a party of four, I highly recommend a reservation to ensure you have the perfect table. I can provide more specific menu details or connect you with our host team to finalize the booking for you.

Since we are celebrating his big day, remember that Mohegan Sun is offering you a $25 dining credit to use toward this special meal. After dinner, you might enjoy heading to the Wolf Den for some live music—it is a fantastic way to keep the energy high for the rest of the night. Does your husband enjoy a classic steakhouse experience, or is he more of a fan of housemade pasta and Italian wines?

Rachel, After an incredible meal at Michael Jordan's, novelle is the perfect next step for a milestone celebration like this. It is an upscale ultra-lounge right here on the property that balances a sophisticated atmosphere with craft cocktails and DJ entertainment, and since it is Thursday, they will be open and ready for your group of four. The energy there is very polished, making it a great spot to grab a table and toast to your husband's 50th.

If you are looking for something with a bit more of a raw, electric feel, the Wolf Den in the Casino of the Earth features free live music every night. It is an intimate venue where you are right there with the performers, which always makes for a memorable night out on the casino floor. 

To help everyone recharge the next morning, a session at Elemis Spa is the perfect reset, as their signature massage treatments are legendary for unwinding after a big celebration. I can help you with more details on the lounge atmosphere at novelle or look into the live music schedule at the Wolf Den, but first, are you in the mood for a high-energy lounge vibe or a spot where you can sit and enjoy a live band?
